title: Button Packet ID Fix
description: In the vanilla, stonecutters couldn't handle more than 256 recipes, this mod fixes that.
body:
In the vanilla, stonecutters couldn't handle more than 256 recipes, this mod fixes that.

You may need this when using [Yuushya Townscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/yuushya-townscape), [Sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill), or just the vanilla stonecutter with a huge number of recipes.


Report bugs on [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/4B3B9Zy253) or [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/ConcerroX/button-packet-id-fix/issues).
